params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a combinational logic circuit that outputs X based on the values of the inputs A1, A2, and the negative logic input B1_N. The output X will be 1 if both A1 and A2 are low (0), 0 if A1 is high and A2 is low (0) or if A1 is low and A2 is high, and will take the complement of B1_N when both A1 and A2 are high.
